feature.name: Shelter of the Faithful
feature.description: Temples of your faith give you free care and a place to rest.

feature.name: False Identity
feature.description: You maintain a convincing second identity with forged documents.

feature.name: Criminal Contact
feature.description: You know a reliable contact who links you to the criminal network.

feature.name: By Popular Demand
feature.description: Your performances earn welcome, lodging, and food wherever you play.

feature.name: Rustic Hospitality
feature.description: Common folk shelter and shield you as one of their own.

feature.name: Guild Membership
feature.description: Your guild offers lodging, contacts, and political backing.

feature.name: Discovery
feature.description: Your seclusion granted a unique, powerful secret or revelation.

feature.name: Position of Privilege
feature.description: Your noble standing earns deference, audiences, and easy welcome.

feature.name: Wanderer
feature.description: You recall terrain and can find food and water in the wild.

feature.name: Researcher
feature.description: You know where or from whom to seek almost any lore.

feature.name: Ship's Passage
feature.description: You can secure free passage aboard ships for yourself and allies.

feature.name: Military Rank
feature.description: Soldiers recognize your former rank and defer to its authority.

feature.name: City Secrets
feature.description: You know hidden city paths and travel them at double speed.
